document.getElementById('validate-form').addEventListener('submit', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); const form = e.target; form.querySelectorAll('.form-control').forEach((el) => { el.classList.remove('is-invalid'); const next = el.nextElementSibling; if (next && next.classList.contains('form-error')) next.remove(); if (!el.checkValidity()) { el.classList.add('is-invalid'); const msg = document.createElement('div'); msg.className = 'form-error'; msg.textContent = el.validationMessage; el.after(msg); } }); });
